V1-eligible robots/sitemap creations qualify.Safe apply availableReadinessNeeds attention before launch8 issue(s) need review before this page should be considered launch-ready.Top issues (5)Search engines do not have a clear preferred URL.ImportantThis page is missing a canonical URL, which helps search engines understand the main address for this content.Without it, duplicate or alternate URLs can be harder to consolidate.Missing og:urlImportantOpen Graph metadata should include the canonical page URL.This signal helps ShipReady decide whether the page is easy for crawlers, previews, and visitors to understand.Missing og:typeImportantOpen Graph metadata should include a type such as website.This signal helps ShipReady decide whether the page is easy for crawlers, previews, and visitors to understand.Your site does not have a sitemap yet.ImportantA sitemap lists the pages you want crawlers to discover.For supported projects, ShipReady can safely create a simple sitemap file.Title is very shortRecommendedA very short title may not explain the page clearly.This signal helps ShipReady decide whether the page is easy for crawlers, previews, and visitors to summary.decision: Decision panelNeeds attention before launch8 issue(s) need review before this page should be considered launch-ready.ModeURL + repositoryReadinessNeeds attentionScore59 / 100Next best actionCreate safe crawl filesOnly V1-eligible robots/sitemap creations qualify.Safe apply available
summary.safeApply: Safe applySafe automatic fix availableShipReady can create these missing crawl files without overwriting existing files:app/robots.tsapp/sitemap.tspnpm shipready fix /Users/fabiencampana/Documents/fodmapp/apps/marketing --url https://fodmapp.fr/ --write --allow-createCopy commandNo overwritesNo metadata or content editsNo Git commitsNo deploysSafe apply policy notesThis ui-report command never writes files.V1 safe apply is limited to creation-only robots/sitemap files.ShipReady will not overwrite existing files in V1 safe apply.ShipReady will not edit metadata, JSON-LD, page content, package files, or configuration in V1 safe apply.ShipReady will not run Git operations, create commits, push, or deploy.Dry-run only. No files were modified.Next.js App Router previews are conservative and read-only; dynamic metadata and component changes are skipped.
